objective: Replace deberta-v3-base with deberta-v3-xsmall and test whether the full notebook can complete on MPS-constrained hardware.

commands.train: jupyter nbconvert --to notebook --execute solution_c_baseline_development.ipynb --output executed_solution_c_baseline.ipynb --output-dir experiments/runs/C_XSMALL_FULL_MPS_003 --ExecutePreprocessor.timeout=0

notes: Run survived materially longer than H001/H002 but still failed with MPS out-of-memory during Trainer._run_epoch. No checkpoint, executed notebook, or prediction CSV was produced. Error reported MPS allocated 1.12 GiB, other allocations 21.54 GiB, max allowed 22.64 GiB.
